name: Galiano
description: GALI is a lighthearted meme project built around the larger-than-life persona of Galiano Tiramani, founder of Boxable. The token’s purpose is to immortalize that persona on-chain—preserving the myth, the jokes, and the community’s creative spin as a permanent blockchain marker. Think of it as a digital monument: shareable, remixable, community-powered, and designed to live forever across wallets, feeds, and culture.
